instructions:
Cleanup cohort 3 of 5 from the 0087 FENCE_RE-fix triage. Mostly mechanical PostRepository method renames with confirmed targets in the current surface. ~10 drift pairs.

## Symbols to rename (confirmed targets)

| Old (drift) | New (current surface) | Pattern |
|---|---|---|
| `PostRepository.updatePost` | `PostRepository.editPost` | rename |
| `PostRepository.isFlaggedByMe` | `PostRepository.isPostFlaggedByMe` | added `Post` infix |
| `PostRepository.getPostsByIds` | `PostRepository.getPostByIds` | plural Ids → singular Id |
| `PostRepository.postForId` | `PostRepository.getPost` | rename to `get` pattern |
| `PostRepository.getPinnedPostsLive` | `PostRepository.getPinnedPosts` | dropped `Live` suffix |
| `PostRepository.queryPosts` | `PostRepository.getPosts` | `query` → `get` pattern |
| `PostRepository.deletePost` | `PostRepository.softDeletePost` (or `hardDeletePost` if context implies hard delete) | already fixed once in 0085; one more occurrence in `use-cases/social/rich-content-creation.mdx` |

## Steps

1. Grep `social-plus-sdk/` and `use-cases/` for each old symbol.
2. Replace with the new name. Read the surrounding context to choose between `softDeletePost`/`hardDeletePost` where ambiguous — default to `softDeletePost` unless the doc explicitly discusses permanent deletion.
3. Run gate. Aim for ~10 pairs cleaned up.

## Out of scope

- Symbols in other cohorts (0088a, b, d, e).
- Adding new content beyond the renames.

## Success criteria

- All listed PostRepository drift pairs resolved.
- No new drift pairs introduced.
- `softDeletePost` vs `hardDeletePost` choice rationale documented per occurrence in result notes.

Report in `notes`: per-symbol file count and delete-choice rationale.
